description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a matte black top and bottom, and a predominantly dark red and black label wrapping around its body. The label features a stylized illustration of a person riding a bicycle, with the word 'Funkaversary' prominently displayed in a bold, decorative font. Additional text and branding elements, including a QR code and various product details, are visible on the sides of the can. The can appears to be made of metal, likely aluminum, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The cap is a standard pull-tab type, typical of beverage cans, and there are no visible signs of damage or deformation. The can is opaque, and it is not possible to determine if there is liquid inside from the images.
description: A tall, cylindrical beverage can with a dark red and black label featuring a person on a bicycle and bold branding. The can has a smooth, metallic finish and detailed text and graphics.
description_view_0: The can's side shows a large block of text and part of the illustrated figure, with the black top and bottom clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can, showing a QR code, nutritional information, and circular logo elements.
description_view_2: The can's side displays the edge of the main illustration, the QR code, and part of the branding text.
description_view_3: The front of the can features the main illustration of a person on a bicycle and the prominent 'Funkaversary' branding.
attribute_label_or_branding: The can features the word 'Funkaversary' in large, stylized white letters on the front, with additional text in smaller fonts, a QR code, and a detailed illustration of a person on a bicycle. The label is primarily dark red and black with orange and white accents.
